prompt: Design a split-view desktop UI: left column lists model layers as collapsible accordions; right pane shows animated node-and-edge graph where nodes pulse electric blue on data flow; glassmorphic header bar with temperature slider and 'Run' button.
prompt_refined: Generate a desktop user interface with a split-view layout. The left column displays a list of model layers, presented as collapsible accordion menus. The right pane features an animated node-and-edge graph where nodes pulse electric blue, indicating data flow. A glassmorphic header bar spans the top of the interface, containing a temperature slider and a 'Run' button.
objects: Collapsible accordion menus displaying model layers
Glassmorphic header bar at the top
